title: Toggle-bank gadget — popup keys (hotspot.json › popup)
description: Fields required by buildToggleBank(). Also inherits the base shell fields defined in panel.schema.json.

prompt.description: Instruction text shown above the switch bank.

switches.description: Ordered list of switch labels, e.g. ["TV", "WINDOW", "CABINET", "HALL"].

initial.description: Initial on/off state per switch. Must be the same length as switches.

target.description: Correct on/off pattern the player must reach. Must be the same length as switches.

on_success.description: Message displayed when the player sets the correct pattern.

on_fail.description: Message displayed when CHECK is pressed with a wrong pattern.

hint.description: Optional hint text. HINT button is hidden when this key is absent.
